testcase.name: testFindBySkuNotFound
testcase.system-out:
09:57:24.674 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.retailr.catalog.repository.ProductRepositoryTest]: ProductRepositoryTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 09:57:24.729 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.retailr.catalog.CatalogServiceApplication for test class com.retailr.catalog.repository.ProductRepositoryTest

Hibernate: create table categories (created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, description varchar(255) not null, name varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table low_stock_alerts (acknowledged_at timestamp(6), acknowledged_by bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, stock_item_id bigint not null, triggered_at timestamp(6) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table product_suppliers (lead_time_days integer not null, minimum_order_quantity integer not null, supply_cost numeric(38,2) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, product_id bigint not null, supplier_id bigint not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table products (low_stock_threshold integer not null, unit_price numeric(38,2) not null, category_id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, description varchar(255) not null, name varchar(255) not null, sku varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table stock_items (quantity INTEGER DEFAULT 0 not null, reserved_quantity INTEGER DEFAULT 0 not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, product_id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, warehouse_id bigint not null, primary key (id), unique (product_id, warehouse_id)) Hibernate: create table stock_movements (quantity_delta integer not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, created_by bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, reference_id bigint, stock_item_id bigint not null, movement_type varchar(255) not null, reference_type varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table suppliers (created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, address varchar(255) not null, contact_person varchar(255) not null, email varchar(255) not null, name varchar(255) not null unique, phone varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table warehouses (created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, location varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id)) Hibernate: alter table if exists low_stock_alerts add constraint FKa3ns9g86fvsixuteajefn1kkv foreign key (stock_item_id) references stock_items Hibernate: alter table if exists product_suppliers add constraint FKj4tjiwcxs97lybw5vac1sjlbp foreign key (product_id) references products Hibernate: alter table if exists product_suppliers add constraint FKmymnd7phgm081dt3iv276yl8a foreign key (supplier_id) references suppliers Hibernate: alter table if exists products add constraint FKog2rp4qthbtt2lfyhfo32lsw9 foreign testcase.name: testSaveProduct
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into categories (created_at,description,name,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into products (category_id,created_at,description,low_stock_threshold,name,sku,unit_price,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default)

testcase.name: testFindByCategory
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into categories (created_at,description,name,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into products (category_id,created_at,description,low_stock_threshold,name,sku,unit_price,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select p1_0.id,p1_0.category_id,p1_0.created_at,p1_0.description,p1_0.low_stock_threshold,p1_0.name,p1_0.sku,p1_0.unit_price,p1_0.updated_at from products p1_0 where p1_0.category_id=? offset ? rows fetch first ? rows only

testcase.name: testFindBySku
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into categories (created_at,description,name,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into products (category_id,created_at,description,low_stock_threshold,name,sku,unit_price,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select p1_0.id,p1_0.category_id,p1_0.created_at,p1_0.description,p1_0.low_stock_threshold,p1_0.name,p1_0.sku,p1_0.unit_price,p1_0.updated_at from products p1_0 where p1_0.sku=?

testcase.name: testSearchByNameOrSku
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into categories (created_at,description,name,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into products (category_id,created_at,description,low_stock_threshold,name,sku,unit_price,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select p1_0.id,p1_0.category_id,p1_0.created_at,p1_0.description,p1_0.low_stock_threshold,p1_0.name,p1_0.sku,p1_0.unit_price,p1_0.updated_at from products p1_0 where lower(p1_0.name) like lower(('%'||?||'%')) escape '' or lower(p1_0.sku) like lower(('%'||?||'%')) escape '' offset ? rows fetch first ? rows only
